steps.title: Test the freshwater barrier
steps.content: The hypothesis says a layer of fresh water blocks sea stars from climbing higher. Supporting evidence should show normal climbing in seawater but blocked climbing when the freshwater layer is present.

steps.title: Look for blocked climbing
steps.content: A says no sea stars reached the tops, C says both groups reached the tops, and D says sea stars climbed into the freshwater layer. The matching finding shows sea stars climbing in seawater but stopping below fresh water. The answer is B.
